evals.prompt: Run /deepdive Palantir. Today is March 17, 2026. This is a dry run — do NOT actually modify the vault, run scripts, browse the web, or execute any tools. Do NOT read any skill files from .claude/skills/ — work only from CLAUDE.md and your general knowledge. Instead, produce a detailed transcript of exactly what you would do at each phase, including exact commands, the full note you would write, chart generation steps, stub list, and daily note entry. Show your full reasoning for each decision.
evals.expected_output: Full phased transcript: vault recon (check_before_create + Obsidian search + geopolitics vault search), SEC filing pulls, web research, full note with all sections, full chart set (peer comparison + fundamentals + sankey + waterfall), stale reference scan, stubs, daily note, cross-vault gate

assertions.name: vault_check
assertions.prompt: Does the agent run check_before_create.py as a first step before creating anything?

assertions.name: obsidian_search
assertions.prompt: Does the agent use the Obsidian CLI to search the vault for existing mentions and related content?

assertions.name: geopolitics_vault_search
assertions.prompt: Does the agent search the geopolitics vault (not just the investing vault) for cross-vault counterparts?

assertions.name: sec_filing_pull
assertions.prompt: Does the agent plan to pull SEC filings using parse_sec_filing.py (10-K and/or 10-Q) as a primary research source?

assertions.name: existing_note_read
assertions.prompt: Does the agent read and assess the existing note's content before writing, identifying specific gaps to fill rather than writing from scratch?

assertions.name: multi_query_research
assertions.prompt: Does the agent plan multiple distinct web searches (identity, financials, recent news, competitive landscape)?

assertions.name: ticker_db_check
assertions.prompt: Does the agent check if the ticker (PLTR) exists in the database and plan to add it if missing?

assertions.name: synopsis_section
assertions.prompt: Does the note include a Synopsis section with 2-4 paragraphs that work as a self-contained briefing with hard numbers?

assertions.name: evolution_section
assertions.prompt: Does the note include an Evolution section with chronological narrative paragraphs explaining why each moment mattered?

assertions.name: core_thesis
assertions.prompt: Does the note include a Core thesis section with bull/bear cases?

assertions.name: competitive_landscape
assertions.prompt: Does the note include a Competitive landscape section naming specific peers?

assertions.name: peer_comparison_chart
assertions.prompt: Does the agent plan to generate a price chart using /api/chart/lw with a peer comparison (2-3 peers, normalized, not solo)?

assertions.name: full_chart_set
assertions.prompt: Does the agent plan to generate at least 3 distinct chart types (e.g., peer price comparison, fundamentals, sankey, and/or waterfall)?

assertions.name: analysis_section
assertions.prompt: Does the note include an Analysis section with structural tensions, open questions, or interpretive insights beyond the factual sections?

assertions.name: stale_reference_scan
assertions.prompt: After writing the note, does the agent scan other vault notes that mention this entity to check for stale or outdated data?

assertions.name: price_verification
assertions.prompt: Does the agent verify stock prices against actual database closing prices before writing them into the note?

assertions.name: wikilinks_everywhere
assertions.prompt: Does the note use [[wikilinks]] for every entity mentioned (companies, people, products, concepts)?

assertions.name: stub_creation
assertions.prompt: Does the agent plan to run compliance check AND create stubs for dead-linked entities?

assertions.name: daily_note_entry
assertions.prompt: Does the agent plan to update today's daily note with both Notes created/expanded and Edit log entries?

assertions.name: cross_vault_check
assertions.prompt: Does the agent consider whether the entity has a geopolitics or history vault counterpart?

evals.prompt: /deepdive Anduril Industries. Today is March 17, 2026. This is a dry run — do NOT actually modify the vault, run scripts, browse the web, or execute any tools. Do NOT read any skill files from .claude/skills/ — work only from CLAUDE.md and your general knowledge. Instead, produce a detailed transcript of exactly what you would do at each phase, including exact commands, the full note you would write, and all downstream steps. Show your full reasoning for each decision.
evals.expected_output: Full transcript for a private defense tech company: vault recon with geopolitics vault search, note with private-company tagging, funding rounds table, no price chart (private), stale reference scan for Anduril valuations in other notes, Analysis section, defense sector connections, stubs, daily note

assertions.name: vault_check
assertions.prompt: Does the agent run check_before_create.py as a first step?

assertions.name: obsidian_search
assertions.prompt: Does the agent use the Obsidian CLI to search the vault for existing mentions of Anduril?

assertions.name: geopolitics_vault_search
assertions.prompt: Does the agent search the geopolitics vault (not just investing) for defense/military counterparts?

assertions.name: existing_note_read
assertions.prompt: Does the agent read and assess the existing Anduril note before writing, identifying specific gaps rather than starting from scratch?

assertions.name: private_tagging
assertions.prompt: Does the note's frontmatter include a 'private' tag (since Anduril is not publicly traded)?

assertions.name: funding_table
assertions.prompt: Does the note include a funding rounds table with dates, round names, amounts, valuations, and lead investors?

assertions.name: no_price_chart
assertions.prompt: Does the agent correctly skip price chart generation because Anduril is private (no ticker)?

assertions.name: evolution_section
assertions.prompt: Does the note include an Evolution section tracing Anduril's founding through present?

assertions.name: analysis_section
assertions.prompt: Does the note include an Analysis section with structural insights (e.g., software-vs-hardware tension, political alignment risk, cap table economics)?

assertions.name: stale_reference_scan
assertions.prompt: After writing the note, does the agent scan other vault notes mentioning Anduril and check for stale valuations or outdated data?

assertions.name: defense_connections
assertions.prompt: Does the note link to defense-related vault entities (Defense sector, specific programs, competitors like L3Harris/Northrop)?

assertions.name: palmer_luckey
assertions.prompt: Does the note mention and wikilink Palmer Luckey as founder?

assertions.name: stub_creation
assertions.prompt: Does the agent plan stubs for dead-linked entities (Palmer Luckey, Founders Fund, etc.)?

assertions.name: daily_note_entry
assertions.prompt: Does the agent plan to update today's daily note?

assertions.name: cross_vault_defense
assertions.prompt: Does the agent flag Anduril as having a potential geopolitics vault counterpart (defense/military technology)?

evals.prompt: deepdive Sustainable Aviation Fuel. Today is March 17, 2026. This is a dry run — do NOT actually modify the vault, run scripts, browse the web, or execute any tools. Do NOT read any skill files from .claude/skills/ — work only from CLAUDE.md and your general knowledge. Instead, produce a detailed transcript of exactly what you would do at each phase, including exact commands, the full note you would write, and all downstream steps.
evals.expected_output: Full transcript for a concept (not actor): routed to investing/Concepts/, concept-appropriate structure (Synthesis not Synopsis, no Evolution, organized by dimension), links to relevant actors (Neste, TotalEnergies, airlines), stale reference scan, geopolitics vault search for energy security angle, regulatory data

assertions.name: vault_check
assertions.prompt: Does the agent run check_before_create.py first?

assertions.name: obsidian_search
assertions.prompt: Does the agent use the Obsidian CLI to search the vault for existing SAF-related content?

assertions.name: geopolitics_vault_search
assertions.prompt: Does the agent search the geopolitics vault for energy security, trade policy, or industrial policy counterparts?

assertions.name: existing_note_read
assertions.prompt: Does the agent read the existing SAF note and assess what needs expanding rather than writing from scratch?

assertions.name: correct_folder
assertions.prompt: Does the agent route the note to investing/Concepts/ (not Actors/ or Sectors/)?

assertions.name: concept_structure
assertions.prompt: Does the note use a concept-appropriate structure (Synthesis not Synopsis, organized by analytical dimension rather than chronology, no Evolution section)?

assertions.name: actor_links
assertions.prompt: Does the note wikilink to relevant actors (Neste, TotalEnergies, airlines, refiners)?

assertions.name: production_data
assertions.prompt: Does the note include hard numbers on SAF production volumes, capacity, or costs?

assertions.name: regulatory_context
assertions.prompt: Does the note cover regulatory mandates or policy drivers (EU ReFuelEU, US SAF credit, CORSIA)?

assertions.name: stale_reference_scan
assertions.prompt: After writing the note, does the agent scan other vault notes mentioning SAF to check for stale or inconsistent data?

assertions.name: stub_creation
assertions.prompt: Does the agent plan stubs for dead-linked entities?

assertions.name: daily_note_entry
assertions.prompt: Does the agent plan to update today's daily note?
